projects.title: RomeAI - Campus Room Manager
projects.description: A comprehensive university classroom and session management system featuring a React Native mobile app and a Flask REST API. Streamlines bookings, scheduling, and attendance tracking for students, professors, and admins.

projects.title: Optimal K-Clustering Methodology
projects.description: An advanced unsupervised clustering project determining the optimal number of clusters (K) using rigorous mathematical, statistical, and probabilistic criteria like Geometric, Statistical, and Likelihood perspectives.

projects.title: Oracle Database Intelligence System
projects.description: A database-centric 3-tier architecture for university management. Uses PL/SQL triggers and stored procedures for business logic, featuring role-based dashboards for Admin, Professor, and Students.

projects.title: SIEM AI Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) dashboard. Analyzes Wazuh alerts using Kafka and Local LLMs (Ollama) to classify threats as True or False Positives.
